title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Prudential Life - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Prudential Life - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Prudential Life! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Prudential Life:
ICICI Prudential Life is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Prudential Life!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
